# simCapability

**Instance Property**

The available type of cellular plan that your eSIM supports.

## Declaration

```swift
var simCapability: CTCellularPlanCapability { get set }
```

## Discussion

Use to define whether your eSIM is capable of data only or data and voice. Refer to [doc://com.apple.coretelephony/documentation/CoreTelephony/CTCellularPlanCapability/dataOnly] or [doc://com.apple.coretelephony/documentation/CoreTelephony/CTCellularPlanCapability/dataAndVoice].

## Getting the eSIM properties

- **associatedIccid**: The integrated circuit card identifier (ICCID) that identifies a SIM.
- **supportedRegionCodes**: The available regions that your eSIM supports.
- **CTCellularPlanProperties.lifecycle**: A type that contains lifecycle details for a time-limited cellular plan.
- **lifecycleProperties**: The lifecycle details for a time-limited cellular plan.
